query:
WITH cte AS (
                SELECT
                    c.id,
                    c.slug,
                    c.user_id,
                    c.parent_id,
                    c.content,
                    c.html_sanitized,
                    c.status,
                    c.path,
                    c.depth,
                    c.like_count,
                    c.created_at,
                    c.updated_at,
                    c.deleted_at,
                    c.created_ip,
                    c.user_agent,
                    c.moderation_reason
                FROM comments c
                WHERE c.slug = $1
                    AND c.status = $2
                    AND c.created_at < (SELECT created_at FROM comments WHERE id = $3)
                ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
                LIMIT $4
            )
            SELECT
                cte.id,
                cte.slug,
                cte.user_id,
                cte.parent_id,
                cte.content,
                cte.html_sanitized,
                cte.status as "status: blog_db::CommentStatus",
                cte.path,
                cte.depth,
                cte.like_count,
                cte.created_at,
                cte.updated_at,
                cte.deleted_at,
                cte.created_ip,
                cte.user_agent,
                cte.moderation_reason,
                u.username,
                u.profile as "profile: _"
            FROM cte
            JOIN users u ON cte.user_id = u.id
